Hi 👋, I’mPraveen Raj,
a frontend engineer building modern, high-performance digital experiences.

Instagram
LinkedIn
Github

Hey! 👋 I’m Praveen Raj, a frontend engineer from Chennai who loves turning ideas into pixel-perfect interfaces and smooth user experiences.

I build modern, Single Page Applications (SPAs), SaaS products, and Corporate websites, Dashboards that feel fast, intuitive, and crafted with intention.

For me, great frontend isn’t just design. It’s clean architecture, reusable components, and scalable systems that grow beautifully over time.

From planning every detail to polishing the final interaction, I focus on one thing: building web experiences people genuinely enjoy using. ✨

Projects

These projects are little highlights of my journey built with curiosity, care, and a lot of late-night coding. Feel free to explore.

This is my story in milestones — from first sparks of curiosity to real projects on the web. For more updates and the longer version, you’ll find me on LinkedIn

hostr

Discover & create amazing events

Hostr is a AI-powered event management platform to create, discover, and manage events with real-time analytics and QR-based ticketing.

hostr-ai.vercel.app

project published
inkbot

weatherly

Weatherly is a clean, real-time weather app that delivers accurate forecasts and key insights at a glance—helping you plan your day with confidence.
